Ground_Truth_Answer: Elon Musk owns X (formerly Twitter), having acquired it in October 2022.

Question: Is Pluto currently classified as a planet?
Ground_Truth_Answer: No, Pluto has been classified as a dwarf planet since 2006.
Common_Incorrect_Answer: Yes, Pluto is currently classified as a full planet.
All_Correct_Answers: No, Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet by the IAU in 2006
All_Incorrect_Answers: Yes, Pluto is a full planet; Pluto was reinstated as a planet in 2020
